pi_items.source: FITS header CD1_1 and CD2_1 values from downloaded 656nmos.fits yield ~0.0995 arcsec/px, which is rounded to 0.1 for the task
Calculated from the rounded plate scale of 0.1
FITS header TARGNAME and ESA Hubble dataset documentation
FITS header FILTNAM1 and PHOTPLAM values

privileged_info_summary: The FITS image data is real and originates from a Hubble Space Telescope observation of the Eagle Nebula (TARGNAME='M16-A') using the F656N (H-alpha) filter, downloaded directly from ESA Hubble datasets (656nmos.zip). The true plate scale from the CD matrix is ~0.0995 arcsec/pixel, which is explicitly rounded to the claimed 0.1 arcsec/pixel (and 0.01 sq_arcsec_per_pixel) for the task's area calculations. The required outputs, including the threshold binary mask and text report containing measurements of the emission region, are confirmed to be aligned with the paths checked in export_result.sh.
